response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video to identify two song performances by Tsunomaki Watame. 2. Identified Song 1 as '革命道中' and Song 2 as 'Catch the Moment'. 3. Searched for lyrics for both songs using original artists (Tsunomaki Watame and LiSA). 4. Mapped scenes based on song performances and transition. 5. Formatted lyrics and metadata into the required JSON structure.
response.global_summary: The video features a vocal performance by VTuber Tsunomaki Watame, performing two songs: her original song '革命道中' (Revolutionary) and a cover of LiSA's 'Catch the Moment'.

scenes.description: Tsunomaki Watame performs her original song '革命道中'. Background visuals feature dancers and fire effects. The song title '革命道中' is displayed on screen.

scenes.description: A short transition where the music pauses and the title 'Catch the Moment' is displayed.
Tsunomaki Watame performs a cover of 'Catch the Moment' by LiSA. The title card 'Catch the Moment' appears on screen.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I quietly inhaled the sigh I breathed out
Regret left behind a bitter taste
Always, why? Unable to say what's essential
The next morning sun is showing its face
I carved up the fate I grew sick of with a knife
If I redo it once more, maybe I won't meet you
At the moment my voice echoed, it begins
The limit of life, my heart is counting
Even if I fulfill it, even if I fulfill it, the wish won't end
The second hand of the world I ran while sweating through
Will someday stop and leave me behind
How many more times can I laugh with you?
I am testing myself, catch the moment
Every time I count one happiness
I fear the future that keeps changing, but
Let's cherish and nurture the seeds of affection
Maybe it will pierce through the thick clouds someday
Your voice echoed through my whole body
Knocking on the door of my heart
Even if I am a 'coward', I'll open it because I want to believe
Under my feet where I thought there was nothing at all
Someday deep, certain roots will grow
Even if a stormy night comes, I won't waver
Again and again
Catching up, overtaking, you suddenly become unrecognizable
Just by matching the timing of breathing
I become happy
I wonder if I can make the collected one second eternal
At the moment my voice echoed, it begins
The limit of life, my heart is counting
Even if I fulfill it, even if I fulfill it, the wish won't end
The second hand of the world I ran while sweating through
Will someday stop and leave me behind
How many more times can I laugh with you?
I am testing myself, catch the moment
I won't let it go, I
Seize this moment, catch the moment
